title: azalea indica var. rosiflora
intro: Azalea indica var. rosiflora, also known as the rose azalea or fragrant azalea, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Azalea indica var. rosiflora include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to help reduce fever and alleviate sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
